headline: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2026 First-Quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
summary: PHOENIX, April 06, 2026--Pinnacle West plans to release its 2026 first-quarter financial results before U.S. financial markets open on Monday, May 4, 2026.
